slides.title: IB Weekly Review
slides.subtitle: W08 Retrospective + W09 Plan — March 13, 2026
slides.catchphrase: We Know Why. Let's Fix It.

items.label: LINE Registrations
items.sub: +10 in W08 / +2 in W09 so far ⚠️

items.label: Location mismatch: students abroad apply to Tokyo in-person roles
Skill mismatch: student profile doesn't meet company requirements
Company response: slow or no reply after applications received
Application concentration: students flood Jurin AI — requirements out of reach

steps.label: CV Sent
steps.description: Forwarded to companies via automated email

steps.label: Under Review
steps.description: Mostly resolved — rejected or in interview stage

steps.label: Match
steps.description: 0 confirmed matches. Next match requires new applications.

after.label: Proposed Flow (With Confirmation)
points: Q1: Based in Tokyo or able to commute?
Q2: Valid work authorization in Japan?
→ Only eligible students proceed to apply

items.title: Reply within 4 business days
items.description: All companies must acknowledge applications within 4 business days. This is a condition of listing on IB.

items.title: IB sends a reminder
items.description: If no reply after 4 business days, IB follows up directly with the company contact.

items.title: Suspend listing if unresponsive
items.description: Repeated non-response leads to temporary suspension of the job listing — to protect student trust.

rows.before: Write onboarding policy: 4-business-day reply rule + suspension
Confirm best-fit companies and send recommendation

slides.contact: IB Weekly — W08 Retro / W09 Plan | March 13, 2026
